All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

M

machinePlayCard() - Method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.TurnManager
 
MachinePlayer - Class in com.trifasico.x50zo.model.players
Represents a machine-controlled participant in a Cincuentazo game.
MachinePlayer(String) - Constructor for class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.players.MachinePlayer
Constructs a MachinePlayer with the given name and a default MachineStrategy instance.
MachinePlayer(String, MachineStrategy) - Constructor for class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.players.MachinePlayer
Constructs a MachinePlayer with the given name and a specific strategy instance, useful for injecting a pre-configured strategy in tests.
MachinePlayThread - Class in com.trifasico.x50zo.controller
A dedicated background thread that processes a machine player's turn with a natural delay before acting, then posts the result back to the JavaFX Application Thread.
MachinePlayThread(TurnManager, MachinePlayThread.ErrorHandler) - Constructor for class com.trifasico.x50zo.controller.MachinePlayThread
Constructs a MachinePlayThread as a daemon thread.
MachinePlayThread.ErrorHandler - Interface in com.trifasico.x50zo.controller
Callback interface used to report unexpected errors back to the controller on the FX thread.
MachineStrategy - Class in com.trifasico.x50zo.model.players
A scoring-based implementation that evaluates each card in the machine's hand and picks the one with the highest score.
MachineStrategy() - Constructor for class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.players.MachineStrategy
Constructs a MachineStrategy with default scoring weights.
MachineThinkingTask - Class in com.trifasico.x50zo.controller
A JavaFX Task that simulates a machine player "thinking" before acting, running the decision and play logic on a background thread.
MachineThinkingTask(TurnManager) - Constructor for class com.trifasico.x50zo.controller.MachineThinkingTask
Constructs a MachineThinkingTask for the given game session.
main(String[]) - Static method in class com.trifasico.x50zo.Main
System execution vector executing programmatic process instructions.
Main - Class in com.trifasico.x50zo
Main application entry point for the runtime framework compilation layer.
Main() - Constructor for class com.trifasico.x50zo.Main
 
MAX_HAND_SIZE - Static variable in class com.trifasico.x50zo.model.players.PlayerAdapter
Maximum number of cards a player may hold at any time.
MenuController - Class in com.trifasico.x50zo.controller
Controller class for the main menu view.
MenuController() - Constructor for class com.trifasico.x50zo.controller.MenuController
